positive: Stylized symmetrical mandala pattern featuring geometric celestial elements and interconnected flora, including stylized crescent moons, stars, and delicate abstract vines. The design must have a clean, high-contrast silhouette structure suitable for repeat apparel printing. Color palette should be limited to deep indigo, metallic gold, and antique cream. Composition must be highly detailed, centralized, and perfectly balanced, resembling ancient tapestry art meets modern cosmic illustration. Minimal shading, relying on crisp line work and strong negative space.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, trademark, writing, noise, grain, artifacts, messy, uneven, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, signature, cropped
